title: aphelandra longiflora
intro: Aphelandra longiflora, also known as the Panama rose or Long-flowered zebra plant, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Aphelandra longiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
